title: UXCROSS
text: UXCROSS UXCROSS is a repository table that is used to create cross-reference reports. It is populated with information in symbol tables. You can maintain the data in this table on a continual basis by setting the $SYMBOL_TABLE assignment setting to 2 or 3. Each time an object included in the symbol tables is compiled, the relevant cross-reference information is added to the UXCROSS table. A new table is created if not already present. Alternatively, you can generate it periodically as a snapshot of the current status of the application using the /sym command line switch. Related Links Symbol Tables Symbol tables contain object references for compiled components, application shells, global ProcScript, menus, and panels. This information can be used to generate cross-reference data during compilation. $SYMBOL_TABLE Specifies whether symbol table files and cross-reference data are generated during compilation. /sym Specify whether object references are generated during compilation, and where they are located.
